The `stream_format` field is added to two payload-building functions in `bench_speaker_cache.py` with value `"audio"` when streaming is enabled.
Documentation in `speech_api.md` updates the `stream` parameter description: `true` now defaults to SSE streaming, and `stream_format="audio"` is required for raw audio.
In `speech_api.md`, the raw audio stream section now states that only `stream_format="audio"` yields raw audio, removing the earlier equivalence with `stream=true`.
The SSE stream section in `speech_api.md` now says `stream=true` or `stream_format="sse"` selects SSE events.
Multiple example files (e.g., `text_to_speech.md`, `README.md`, recipe markdown files) now include `"stream_format": "audio"` in curl commands and code snippets that intend to use raw PCM streaming.
Client scripts (e.g., `speech_client.py` for cosyvoice3, fish_speech, etc.) set `payload["stream_format"] = "audio"` when `args.stream` is true.
Gradio demo apps (fish_speech, glm_tts, voxcpm2, moss_tts_nano, etc.) conditionally add `"stream_format": "audio"` to the payload when streaming is enabled.

End-to-end test files for all TTS models (cosyvoice3, glm_tts, higgs_audio, indextts2, ming_tts, moss_tts, qwen3_tts, voxcpm2, voxtral) now include `"stream_format": "audio"` in streaming request payloads.
In `test_serving_speech.py`, `test_stream_valid` now asserts that `stream=true` results in `is_sse_stream()==True` and `is_raw_audio_stream()==False`.
`is_raw_audio_stream()` in `OpenAICreateSpeechRequest` is changed from `self.stream or self.stream_format == "audio"` to `self.stream_format == "audio"`.
`is_sse_stream()` is changed from `self.stream_format == "sse" and not self.is_raw_audio_stream()` to `(self.stream or self.stream_format == "sse") and not self.is_raw_audio_stream()`.
In `serving_speech.py`, the word_timestamps check is moved outside the `is_raw_audio_stream()` block; it now applies to any streaming mode via `is_streaming()`.
The benchmark patch script (`patch.py`) now includes `"stream_format": "audio"` in its request payload and updates its docstring to require it for raw PCM streaming.
The `send_audio_speech_request` helper in `tests/helpers/runtime.py` now forwards the `"stream_format"` key in `extra_body`.
